content_body: We were two families evacuating from Florida during Hurricane Milton. The owners were incredibly responsive and gracious to take us in at the last minute and accommodate our needs. The property itself was in a lovely area close to Mercier Orchards, McCaysville, and up above the Toccoa River. The access to the river was absolutely incredible and made our stay that much more enjoyable. The house is well lived-in and provided the space and amenities we needed for our week-long stay.
title: Mountain Haven From the Storm
